# onelogin Provider

The OneLogin provider allows you to manage OneLogin resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    onelogin = {
      source = "spbsoluble/onelogin"
    }
  }
}

provider "onelogin" {
  api_url = "https://api.us.onelogin.com"
  # client_id and client_secret can also be set via
  # ONELOGIN_CLIENT_ID and ONELOGIN_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) OneLogin API URL (e.g. https://api.us.onelogin.com). Can also be set via ONELOGIN_API_URL.
- `client_id` (String) OneLogin API client ID. Can also be set via ONELOGIN_CLIENT_ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OneLogin API client secret. Can also be set via ONELOGIN_CLIENT_SECRET.
- `timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds for API operations. Defaults to 180.
